dailyNews.description: Qasem Soleimani, who led the IRGC, was killed in a drone strike ordered by President Trump near the Baghdad International Airport in Iraq in 2020

dailyNews.title: Plea in Supreme Court challenges transgender law amendments as breach of right to self-determined gender identity
dailyNews.description: Activists Laxminarayan Tripathi and Zainab Javid Patel challenge the validity of the Act for disregarding transgender identity as an ‘authentic human identity, freely chosen’

dailyNews.title: Iran says US, Israel belong in Stone Age after Tehran university strike
dailyNews.description: Iranian minister said the US and Israel are the ones that belong in the Stone Age after an attack on Tehran university.

dailyNews.title: Quote of the Day by Charlie Chaplin: ‘You’ll never find a rainbow if…'
dailyNews.description: Charlie Chaplin's timeless words — 'You'll never find a rainbow if you're looking down' — remind us that hope is a direction, not just a feeling. Look up, and life's beauty reveals itself.

dailyNews.title: ‘Authority carries accountability’: Supreme Court restores bank manager’s dismissal
dailyNews.description: The top court noted allegations that the senior manager had connived with an officer and a gunman to misappropriate the money of customers for personal gain and steal bank records.

dailyNews.title: Central govt must not treat states as subordinates: SC Justice Nagarathna
dailyNews.description: Supreme Court Justice BV Nagarathna said the central government should treat states as equals, promoting cooperative federalism over hierarchical governance.

dailyNews.title: Congress raised ₹5.38 crore for Wayanad rehabilitation, says Sunny Joseph
dailyNews.description: KPCC president accuses the CPI(M) of spreading baseless allegations; he says all transactions were traceable and open for verification; raises the issue of poll irregularities in Kannur

dailyNews.title: US Rescues One Crew Member From F-15 Jet Downed in Iran
dailyNews.description: Iran downed a US F-15E fighter jet and the US has rescued one of the two-person crew, according to a US official.

dailyNews.title: '48 hours before...': Trump issues ultimatum to Iran to make a deal, open Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: '48 hours before...': Trump issues ultimatum to Iran to make a deal, open Strait of Hormuz

dailyNews.title: Trump calls out NYT for misstating NATO as North American Treaty Organisation, says 'very interesting mistake'
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump criticised the New York Times for mistakenly calling NATO the North American Treaty Organization, citing it as a significant error. He claimed the newspaper's credibility has declined due to ‘fake news’, leading to reduced circulation.

dailyNews.title: "Your Sons More In Danger With Trump": Iran To US Woman Worried For Pilot Son
dailyNews.description: Iran downed two US military aircraft in separate incidents on Friday. One crew member was rescued, while at least one remains missing.

dailyNews.title: Plea in Supreme Court challenges 2026 Transgender Rights Amendment, says it causes ‘irreparable constitutional injury’
dailyNews.description: Supreme Court petition challenges 2026 Transgender Rights Amendment passed by Parliament

dailyNews.title: Over 30 universities hit by US-Israeli strikes since February 28, says Iranian Science Minister
dailyNews.description: Iranian media reported that American and Israeli aircraft targeted various strategic and civilian sites in Tehran on Friday afternoon, including the Shahid Beheshti University

dailyNews.title: ‘Do not intend to seek permission’: Russia sends strong message on oil sales, calls it ‘matter of national sovereignty’
dailyNews.description: Oil rallied Thursday after Trump vowed an escalation in the conflict against Iran over the coming weeks – which could disrupt energy flows through the vital Strait of Hormuz

dailyNews.title: Quote of the day by Bo Bennett on making mistakes: ‘Our mistakes don’t define us, it is how we…'
dailyNews.description: The quote tells us to not get bowed down by the mistakes we make – doesn't matter where – because that's not what defines us. What defines us is how we learn from those mistakes.

dailyNews.title: Attacks on nuclear facilities ‘will end life’ in gulf cities not Tehran: Iran’s FM after US-Israel strikes on Bushehr
dailyNews.description: Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi warned that further strikes on the Bushehr nuclear power plant could lead to radioactive fallout affecting GCC capitals. He slammed Western silence over the attacks, which he claims have occurred multiple times.

dailyNews.title: Congress leader Ibobi urges Centre to delay Manipur census till normalcy is restored
dailyNews.description: Ibobi Singh urges Centre to defer Census in Manipur, citing displacement, data accuracy concerns and ongoing law and order challenges.

dailyNews.title: Projectile hits near Iran’s Bushehr nuclear plant, killing one: IAEA
dailyNews.description: Tehran says it is the fourth attack near the nuclear plant amid the US-Israel war on Iran.

dailyNews.title: Quote of the Day: John D. Rockefeller urges bold choices — ‘Don’t be afraid to give up…’
dailyNews.description: Rockefeller’s words remind us to think big and act with courage. They encourage people to trust their abilities, embrace change, and not fear leaving their comfort zone.

dailyNews.title: Quote of the Day by Ray Dalio: Why investors chase the past
dailyNews.description: American billionnare Ray Dalio's quote is really a warning against recency bias—the habit of mistaking what has just worked for what will keep working.

dailyNews.title: Bikaner Bhujia may get pricier: US-Iran war disrupts namkeen exports to Gulf, Europe
dailyNews.description: The manufacturers of Bikaner's namkeen industry now fear that the economic instability caused by the US-Iran war in West Asia may increase the costs of the products.

dailyNews.title: Rescue team in Iran face 'harrowing and dangerous' search for US crew member
dailyNews.description: A former US marine tells the BBC the priority of any recovery team would be to look for signs of life.

dailyNews.title: 'Definitely carried out by Zionists': Iran denies involvement in attack on US Embassy in Riyadh
dailyNews.description: Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps condemned the March attack on the US embassy in Riyadh, denying involvement and blaming Israel. Following drone strikes on Oman, Iran claimed these were ‘false flag’ operations. Tensions rise as Iran rejects a US ceasefire proposal amid escalating conflict.

dailyNews.title: IRGC's 'larger than normal' presence poses challenge in search for missing F-15E crew member, expert warns
dailyNews.description: Military expert says U.S. search and rescue for a missing F-15E crew member in Iran is complicated by a large IRGC presence in the crash region.

topStories.title: James Carville goes on profanity-laced Trump tirade, says he hopes president doesn’t ‘croak’ before midterms
topStories.description: James Carville scorches Trump in a profanity-laced YouTube rant, questioning his fitness for office and taunting his declining approval poll numbers.

topStories.title: Trump unveils $1.5T defense surge, deep domestic cuts — what’s on the budget chopping block
topStories.description: The White House proposes a fiscal year 2027 budget with roughly $1.5 trillion in defense spending and sweeping cuts to key domestic programs.

topStories.title: JONATHAN TURLEY: Kamala Harris backs radical plan to block Trump SCOTUS picks
topStories.description: Former Vice President Kamala Harris is rallying Democratic donors to oppose potential Trump Supreme Court nominees through the group Demand Justice.

topStories.title: Trump Pledged a Quick End to the Iran War, but He Hasn’t Explained How
topStories.description: President Trump bet that American firepower could cow Iran into compliance. So far, Iran’s leaders have been unwilling to quit.

topStories.title: New Attorney General, Same Albatross: Trump’s Quest for Retribution
topStories.description: The name atop the Justice Department’s organizational chart matters less than the presence of a president whose demands for revenge have become so extreme that even his most obsequious appointees have fallen short.

topStories.title: Trump Contemplates Other Cabinet Changes as He Faces Political Clock
topStories.description: With the midterms approaching, the president may be running out of time to get new cabinet members confirmed without bipartisan support.

topStories.title: ‘I Got Back Every Penny’: Inside Trump’s Supercharged Tax Season
topStories.description: The law Republicans passed last year has so far been largely imperceptible to most Americans. That’s changing as tens of millions file their taxes this spring.

dailyNews.title: Epstein Presented Himself to Indian Tycoon as a Trump White House Insider
dailyNews.description: The convicted sex offender gave Anil Ambani information on appointments and foreign policy. Some seemed prescient, though there was no evidence he was close to the administration.

dailyNews.title: Trump Wants to Make Deportation Deals. Autocrats Are Ready to Listen.
dailyNews.description: The White House has turned deportations, a signature domestic issue, into a major piece of foreign policy. Here’s what we know about the program.

dailyNews.title: Foreign Doctors Forced Out of U.S. Hospitals by Trump Immigration Policy
dailyNews.description: Physicians from 39 countries are being pushed out of U.S. hospitals as a policy blocks their ability to work.

dailyNews.title: Pam and Kristi, Kicked to the Curb
dailyNews.description: Trump girls gone wild — or just gone.

dailyNews.title: Trump Needs Smarter Sycophants
dailyNews.description: Loyal losers don’t go very far with this president.

dailyNews.title: Arrest of Wisconsin Mosque Leader Was Tied to Trump Antisemitism Campaign
dailyNews.description: Immigration lawyers and former federal officials say the case of Salah Sarsour echoes those against other pro-Palestinian activists.

dailyNews.title: Judge halts Trump effort requiring colleges show they don't consider race
dailyNews.description: The ruling follows a lawsuit filed earlier this month by a coalition of 17 Democratic state attorneys general.

dailyNews.title: Trump warns "time is running out" on Iran to reopen Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: Meanwhile, a search-and-rescue mission for a downed fighter jet crew member is ongoing as the war in the Middle East rages on.

dailyNews.title: Did Trump help write the latest White House East Wing court filing?
dailyNews.description: The government's legal bid to continue East Wing construction has the hallmarks of President Trump's social media posts.

dailyNews.title: Trump warns Iran '48 hours before all Hell will reign down,' while search for missing crew member intensifies
dailyNews.description: The U.S. military continued to search for a missing American airman on Saturday after an F-15E fighter jet was shot down over southwestern Iran.

dailyNews.title: Warsh nomination moves ahead, putting Trump's competing Fed plans on a collision course
dailyNews.description: A Senate committee will consider Kevin Warsh's nomination even as one of its members still plans to block it.

dailyNews.title: Trump tariff fallout: Some industries grapple with lingering effects one year later
dailyNews.description: A year after his "liberation day," Trump's trade war has reshaped how companies in industries such as retail and autos are modeling economic and policy risk.
